error_signature: workflow not executing in preview mode
title: Workflow not executing in preview mode
symptom: The workflow works perfectly in 'Test workflow' mode but fails to execute in 'Preview' mode. Conditions and workflows do not trigger as expected.
not_this_if: Workflow executes correctly in test mode
root_cause: The issue arises from having multiple workflows for different states of the checkbox. When the checkbox state changes, the conditions may not align correctly, causing the workflow to not execute in preview mode.
fix_steps: Combine the separate workflows into one
Use a conditional statement to handle both checked and unchecked states
Test the combined workflow in preview mode
agent_instruction: Combine the workflows into a single workflow with a conditional check for the checkbox state.
